full_text:
Pang Di йҫҗиҝӘ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pang Di (йҫҗиҝӘ). Praised for being incorrupt and worthy. Pang Di was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
